hero.title:
Where Talent Meets 
 Opportunity
hero.subtitle: Connect with players, coaches, and clubs around the world. Develop your sports career with Global Play 360.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Join thousands of athletes, coaches, and clubs who are already building their future.

step1.title: Create your Profile
step1.desc: Showcase your skills, stats, and highlight videos.

step2.title: Discover Opportunities
step2.desc: Easily find club offers and compatible profiles.

step3.title: Connect and Apply
step3.desc: Send direct messages and apply to open positions.

step4.title: Level Up
step4.desc: Accelerate your professional career in the sports world.

pricing.title: Free vs Premium
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your goals and accelerates your career.

social.title: Follow Us on Social Media
social.subtitle: Join our community and stay up to date with the latest sports opportunities and news.

banner.title: Founding Members – Free Access
banner.description: Be one of the first 100 members to join and get free Premium access until July 1, 2026!

footer.description: Global Play 360 is the leading platform connecting athletes, coaches, and sports organizations worldwide.

newsletter.title: Join the global sports revolution
newsletter.subtitle: Get exclusive opportunities, updates and private offers from GlobalPlay360 delivered straight to your inbox.
newsletter.privacy: We will never share your email. You can unsubscribe anytime.

hero.subtitle: Global Play 360 is the premier platform connecting athletes, coaches, and sports organizations worldwide. Our mission is to democratize access to sports opportunities and empower professionals to reach their full potential.

serve.title: Who We Serve
serve.subtitle: Our platform is designed to meet the unique needs of every participant in the sports ecosystem.

players.title: For Players
players.desc: Showcase your skills with a professional profile, find open trials, connect with clubs directly, and take the next big step in your sporting career.

coaches.title: For Coaches
coaches.desc: Discover new coaching opportunities, build your professional network, and connect with organizations looking for your specific expertise and tactical vision.

clubs.title: For Clubs
clubs.desc: Post open positions, scout verified talent globally, manage incoming applications efficiently, and build your championship-winning team.

milestones.title: Built on strong foundations
milestones.subtitle: No inflated metrics. Just the principles we refuse to compromise on — from day one.

multisport.title: Multi-sport platform
multisport.desc: Built from day one to support football, basketball, tennis and beyond — with profile schemas adapted to each discipline.

secure.title: Secure by default
secure.desc: Firebase Auth with email verification, Stripe-managed payments and Firestore rules that never trust the client.

multilingual.title: Multilingual from day one
multilingual.desc: Fully translated into English, Spanish and Catalan so athletes and clubs feel at home, whatever their market.

founding.title: Founding stage
founding.desc: We are early and we embrace it. Every feature lands with feedback from real Founding Members shaping the roadmap.

arch.title: Architecture & Security
arch.subtitle: We take infrastructure seriously so you can focus on sport.

stripe.title: Stripe-grade payments
stripe.desc: Built on the same infrastructure that powers Zoom and Shopify. We never store card data on our servers.

auth.title: Enterprise-grade authentication
auth.desc: Firebase Auth with email verification, secure password reset and Google Sign-in. Sessions handled server-side.

gdpr.title: GDPR-first by design
gdpr.desc: Data hosted in europe-west1. Right to erasure implemented via Cloud Functions. Transparent privacy controls.

realtime.title: Real-time synchronization
realtime.desc: Firestore listeners and Stripe webhooks keep every subscription, chat and application in sync across devices instantly.

roadmap.title: Our public roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: What we have shipped, what we are building and what is coming next.

founding.title: Be one of the first 100
founding.subtitle: Join GlobalPlay360 as a Founding Member: unlimited Premium access, private roadmap input and early-bird pricing for life.
founding.privacy: No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. Pure sports community.

closing.title: Partnerships, press or a bold idea?
closing.subtitle: We read every email. If GlobalPlay360 resonates with your organization, let’s build something.

pricingPage.title: Choose your plan
pricingPage.subtitle1: Start for free or unlock your full potential with Premium. Try it
pricingPage.cancelBanner: The subscription was not completed. You can try again whenever you want.

premium.title: Premium
premium.desc: Professional tools to accelerate your career.
premium.manage: Manage your subscription from the dashboard.

pricingPage.trustText: Secure payment managed by Stripe · Billed in EUR · VAT included where applicable

cancelBanner.message2: Until then, you can continue to enjoy all Premium features.

portal.title: Manage Subscription
portal.desc: Cancel, update payment method, or download invoices on Stripe's secure portal.
portal.note: You will be redirected to a secure page hosted by Stripe. Once finished, you will automatically return here.

checkoutSuccess.title: Welcome to Premium!
checkoutSuccess.desc: Your subscription has been successfully activated. You have a <1>30-day free trial</1>  the first charge will be made when the period ends. You can cancel anytime from the billing panel.

messages.pageSubtitle: Communicate with clubs and coaches to manage your opportunities.
messages.unlockDesc: Get direct access to elite organizations and clubs and respond immediately. The ultimate tool for closing signings.
messages.emptyDesc: Search for opportunities or start conversations to begin talking with clubs worldwide.
messages.lockDesc: With Premium you can read and reply to messages from coaches and scouts without limits. Start your free 30-day trial.
messages.basicAccountNotified: We've notified them. They'll be able to reply once they activate Premium.

disclaimer.title: Document under review
disclaimer.body: This text is a draft based on standard GDPR and LSSI templates. It does not replace professional legal advice. Before production launch, this content must be reviewed and adapted by a specialist lawyer.
